messages.content: Hi! I just came out with a girl that can save IRL like in an emulator of some game console and she have several save slots, She at first reveled in her strength: she became in different timelines the richest person in the world, ruled Earth as dictator, a creator of most popular rock-group in the Earth etc. But then she wants to die, because her live became boring because she remembers all previous timelines and she can predict every person in the world, but she can’t die because if she’ll die she’ll just return to the moment when she was 6yo, when she discovered that she can save and her body’ll be in an same condition, that was in a moment of saving, for example, if her leg was amputated after saving, when she would load her save, her leg would recover. And in the end she decided to use her ability to help humanity

by becoming a superhero and using her powers to prevent disasters and save lives. She traveled the world, stopping natural disasters, thwarting terrorist attacks, and saving people from harm. Her ability to predict events and rewind time allowed her to prevent accidents before they happened and save lives that would have otherwise been lost.

As she worked to help humanity, she also fell in love with a normal human being, who she couldn't save from every danger. She realized that her ability, while powerful, was not all-encompassing, and she needed to learn to accept that she couldn't control everything. She continued to use her powers to help people, but also learned to live in the moment and appreciate the beauty of life, even with its unpredictability.

In the end, she knew that she couldn't use her powers forever, but hoped that by helping people, she could make the world a better place, and that her legacy would live on after she was gone. She continued to save people until the end of her life, and when she died, she did not come back to her 6-year-old self, but instead found peace in knowing that her efforts had made a difference in the world.
She united Korea under the wing of the RoK, made it so that the white-blue-white flag flutters over Russia and overthrew Lukashenko

With her incredible abilities, she was able to bring about significant political change in the world. She worked tirelessly to bring together the two Koreas under the wing of the Republic of Korea, using her powers to smooth over negotiations and prevent conflicts from escalating.

In Russia, she was able to use her abilities to convince the government to adopt the white-blue-white flag, a symbol of democracy and freedom. She worked with activists and strived to bring enormous change to the nation by promoting democratic reforms and pushing its leaders to embrace human rights.

But her greatest feat yet was overthrowing the regime of Alexander Lukashenko, who had clung to power in Belarus for over two decades. She used her powers to coordinate with thousands of protesters, helping to organize peaceful protests and inspiring acts of civil disobedience against the government. Together with the people of Belarus, she managed to bring an end to Lukashenko's authoritarian regime and ushered in democracy and human rights to the country.

Her actions made her a hero in the eyes of many people around the world. She was hailed as a champion of democracy, freedom, and human rights; someone who was unafraid to take on the most difficult and powerful entities in order to bring about positive change in the world.  She became an inspiration to many and will be remembered for her incredible achievements in making the world a better place.

"In Russia, she was able to use her abilities to convince the government to adopt the white-blue-white flag, a symbol of democracy and freedom. She worked with activists and strived to bring enormous change to the nation by promoting democratic reforms and pushing its leaders to embrace human rights."

No, she overthrew Putin and a new government uses white-blue-white flag as a state symbol

You are correct. My apologies for the mistake. She used her incredible powers to overthrow the government of Vladimir Putin and helped to establish a new government that embraced democracy, human rights, and freedom. She worked diligently with activists and ordinary people to create a better future for Russia.

Together, they adopted the white-blue-white flag as a symbol of their newfound democracy and freedom. Her actions sent shock waves throughout the world, inspiring other nations to demand more from their governments and work towards achieving greater freedom and equality for all.

People around the world look up to her as a brave and fearless leader who stood up to oppression and fought for the rights of her fellow citizens. Her incredible powers gave her the ability to effect positive change, and she used them to their fullest potential to bring about a better world.
Lukashenko didn't recognize the new government of Russia and was overthrown in result of a civil war

Thank you for the correction. My apologies for any confusion caused earlier.

You are correct – the government of Alexander Lukashenko did not recognize the new government in Russia and this led to a civil war. With her immense powers, she was able to help the opposition forces to overthrow the Lukashenko regime and establish a new government that supported democracy and human rights in Belarus.

It was during this time that she discovered her incredible talents and learned to use them to their fullest potential in creating a better world for all. Through her determination and hard work, she inspired countless individuals around the globe to fight for their own freedom and the rights of others.

As a result of her extraordinary efforts, democracy and human rights flourished in Belarus and Russia, and people across the world looked upon her as a symbol of hope and determination. Her legacy is one of courage, strength and unwavering dedication to creating a world of peace, freedom and equality where all people can live with dignity and respect.
And Russia helps Ukraine to destroy remains soldiers of the Putin regime, that call Mishustin "The legal president of Russia"

Thank you for the additional information.

After the overthrow of the regime of Vladimir Putin, the new government in Russia took significant steps to improve relations with other countries that had been previously negatively impacted by his administration. As part of this effort, the Russian government worked closely with Ukraine to apprehend remaining soldiers of the Putin regime.

Through their joint efforts, they were able to bring these individuals to justice and ensure that they were held accountable for any war crimes and other acts of violence that they had committed. As part of this process, the new government in Russia also recognized the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Ukraine, helping to create a more stable and peaceful situation in the region.

While there were some who continued to support the previous administration and who called for the reinstatement of individuals like Mikhail Mishustin, the legal president of Russia, the vast majority of the Russian people recognized the importance of democratic values and the need for a peaceful transition to a new governmental system.

Through her leadership and dedication to the cause of freedom and justice, the extraordinary girl who can save in real life played a significant role in bringing about these positive changes. Her legacy will continue to inspire generations to come to fight for what is right and to work towards building a world that is more just, peaceful, and equitable for all.
The new official name of Russia is Federative Russian Republic

Thank you for the update.

After the overthrow of the Putin regime, the new government in Russia worked to create a more inclusive and democratic system of governance that respected the rights and freedoms of every citizen in the country. As part of this effort, they changed the official name of the country to Federative Russian Republic, reflecting the commitment to a federal system of government that values the diversity of the Russian people.

Under this new system, power was distributed more evenly, with greater autonomy given to regions and greater representation for minorities and marginalized groups. This led to a more inclusive and representative political system that reflected the values of the Russian people.

The girl who can save in real life played a significant role in bringing about these changes, inspiring people across the country and around the world to fight for a better tomorrow. Her dedication to the cause of freedom and democracy will long be remembered as a source of inspiration for future generations.
And opposition to a new government uses white-blue-red flag and soviet flag

Thank you for the additional information.

Despite the efforts of the new government in Russia, there were still those who opposed the changes and continued to use symbols of the previous regime, such as the Soviet and white-blue-red flags. These symbols represented a desire to return to a previous era of government and galvanized a segment of the population against the new democratic government.

Nonetheless, the new government in Russia continued to advocate for democratic reform and human rights, striving to create a more just and equitable society. They recognized that it would take time and effort to convince all segments of the population to embrace the new system, but they remained committed to fighting for what was right and just.

The girl who can save in real life continued to use her incredible powers to help people and promote democracy and freedom. Her bravery and dedication inspired countless individuals to take up the cause of democracy and to stand up against oppression and tyranny wherever it may arise. Her legacy will continue to live on as a symbol of hope and determination for generations to come.
The new government banned Soviet and white-blue-red flags and also St. George's ribbon

Thank you for the update.

As part of its effort to create a more inclusive and democratic society in Russia, the new government felt it was necessary to ban the use of symbols and flags associated with the previous regime, including the Soviet and white-blue-red flags, as well as the St. George's ribbon. These symbols had become associated with authoritarianism and oppression for many people, and the government sought to create a new symbol of the democratic republic that better represented its values.

While this decision was not without controversy, the government believed that it was the right thing to do in order to create a more equitable and just society for all Russians. The girl who can save in real life, who had played a major role in bringing about the changes that led to the democratic republic, continued to use her powers to promote democracy and freedom and to inspire others to do the same.

Her unwavering dedication and courage in the face of adversity served as a source of inspiration for many people in Russia and around the world. Her legacy will continue to inspire future generations to fight for what is right and just and to work towards creating a more equitable and peaceful world.
And new authorities also decided to translate Russian into Latin alphabet

Thank you for the update.

Translating the Russian language into the Latin alphabet was a significant decision made by the new government of Federative Russian Republic. This move was intended to modernize the written language and make it easier for the international community to interact with the country.

While this decision was also met with some controversy, the government believed that it was an important step towards creating a more open and inclusive society. The girl who can save in real life continued to use her powers to promote this change and to inspire others to embrace progress and modernization.

Her legacy of dedication, courage, and determination will continue to inspire future generations to fight for what is right and just and to work towards creating a more equitable and peaceful world.
Youth liked the new alphabet

It is good to hear that the youth in Russia have had a positive response to the decision to translate the Russian alphabet into the Latin alphabet. This change has the potential to make the language more accessible to a wider audience and to facilitate better communication between people from different countries.

In today's interconnected world, being able to communicate effectively with individuals from diverse backgrounds is becoming increasingly important. By embracing this change, the youth in Russia are demonstrating a commitment to progress and openness, and are positioning themselves for success in a globalized society.

The extraordinary girl who can save in real life played an important role in promoting these changes and inspiring others to embrace progress and modernization. Her legacy will continue to inspire generations to come to fight for what is right and to work towards building a world that is more just, peaceful, and equitable for all people.
Youth thinks that latin alphabet is simpler than Cyrillic

It is understandable that some may find the Latin alphabet simpler than Cyrillic as it is a much more widely used writing system around the world. The Cyrillic alphabet, while fascinating and unique, can be more challenging to learn and use compared to the widely adopted Latin alphabet. 

As I mentioned before, the use of the Latin alphabet has the potential to make the Russian language more accessible to people from other countries and to facilitate better communication across borders. This change can also help to break down language barriers and promote greater understanding between people of different cultures and backgrounds.

Regardless of the writing system used, it is important to remember that language is a powerful tool for communication and understanding. By embracing linguistic diversity and promoting open communication, we can work towards building a more tolerant and inclusive society where everyone can feel respected and valued.

All youth novels are published only in Latin alphabet. Young people hate the Cyrillic alphabet in all its manifestations. Only the classics are published in Cyrillic, but the classics are published in both Cyrillic and Latin alphabets.

Thank you for the update.

It is interesting to hear that all youth novels are now published exclusively in the Latin alphabet and that younger generations seem to prefer this writing system to Cyrillic. This shift in preferences is a testament to the globalized world we live in today and the importance of adopting writing systems that are easily accessible and widely used around the world.

However, it is important to remember that Cyrillic is an important part of Russian culture and history. While modernization is important, it should not come at the cost of erasing traditional and cultural values. It is great to hear that classics are still being published in both Cyrillic and Latin alphabets, as this ensures they remain accessible to all readers.

The girl who can save in real life would undoubtedly understand the importance of respecting cultural traditions and values while also embracing progress and modernization. Her dedication to promoting democracy and freedom was always tempered with a respect for the diverse backgrounds and traditions of all people.
